headline: Craig Bellamy
body: Craig Bellamy expected to join Burnley as new head coach. Compensation could be around £1m. Bellamy had given his commitment to Wales, but is now set to depart. Steve Cooper are Eric Ramsey are two early contenders to replace Bellamy.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 🤝 alex_crook
raw_text:
Craig Bellamy expected to join Burnley as new head coach. Compensation could be around £1m.

Bellamy had given his commitment to Wales, but is now set to depart.

Steve Cooper are Eric Ramsey are two early contenders to replace Bellamy.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿

🤝 @alex_crook
